title: Senior Financial Analyst - NHB Holdings Services - Freshers Welcome

jsonLd.title: Senior Financial Analyst - NHB Holdings Services - Freshers Welcome
jsonLd.description:
NHB Holdings Services is actively seeking a talented and motivated Senior Financial Analyst to join our dynamic team in Gwalior. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About NHB Holdings Services:
NHB Holdings Services is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in Budgeting

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Learning & development budget
• Flexible working hours
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Gwalior, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with NHB Holdings Services!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
